settings.title: Health Policy
settings.content: Please reschedule if you are unwell or showing symptoms of illness. Come with freshly washed, detangled hair unless a wash is booked.

settings.title: Cancellations
settings.content: Cancellations must be made at least 48 hours in advance. Deposits are non-refundable.

settings.title: Extra Guest
settings.content: To keep appointments on schedule, please do not bring extra guests or children to your appointment.

settings.title: Deposits
settings.content: A non-refundable deposit is required to book. It is applied toward your total service cost.

settings.title: Late Arrivals
settings.content: There is a 15-minute grace period. Arrivals later than 15 minutes may be rescheduled and forfeit the deposit.

settings.title: Travel Fee
settings.content: Mobile and travel appointments may incur an additional fee based on distance. Ask for a quote.

settings.title: Reschedule
settings.content: One reschedule is allowed with 48 hours' notice. Your deposit transfers to the new date.
